text:
Erbier Mano (エルビエ＝マノ, Erubie Mano) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 202) is a Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Erbier Mano has short, bowl cut-styled hair. He wears a long, dark overcoat and plain shoes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

Plot

Greed Island arc

After Gon and Killua obtain their first specified slot card "Sword of Truth" in Antokiba, Erbier, along with Kazsule, Asta, and some other experienced players, appear with the intention of stealing it. The players opt to decide the order they will each cast their spells through rock-paper-scissors, though the card is ultimately obtained by Kazsule. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Eventually, Erbier's name appears in Gon's binder with a white dot next to his name, indicating he is still alive and in the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Following Gon's acquisition of 99 specified slot cards and the announcement of a final quiz, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 182 Erbier teleports to Gon's group alongside Linn. The duo approach the group and offer to sell them "Ruler's Blessing" for 5% of Battera's reward (2.5 billion) if they win the quiz, unaware Battera cancelled the contract following his lover's death. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 17, Chapter 174 Killua accepts, if they can manage to pull it off. The quiz begins and Erbier takes it with Linn, though they ultimately lose to Gon. In spite of their loss, they congratulate Gon on his victory. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Erbier Mano is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Erbier Mano's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
